title: SourceAcquisitionManifest
description: Written by acquisition/download.py for every dataset. Records exactly what was fetched, from where, its size + checksums, the license snapshot at acquisition time, and enough state to resume. Lives under $SWM_DATA_ROOT/state/<dataset_id>/source_manifest.json (working storage) and a redacted copy is committed under reports/acquisition/.

download_method.description: hf_load_dataset | hf_hub_download | hf_snapshot | git_clone | curl | manual | none

path.description: Path relative to the dataset raw dir.

estimated_total_bytes.description: Pre-download size estimate used for the storage guard.

license_snapshot.description: What the official source stated about the license AT ACQUISITION TIME.

verified_from.description: URL/path the license text was read from.

resume_state.description: Method-specific state to resume an interrupted acquisition.
